variants: Zareh Avedisian is a resident of Glasspetal Isle who excels in the field of Science Communication. His work has earned him recognition in the form of the Silver Echo Citation, showcasing his ability to effectively share scientific knowledge. He is the author of the Deepsea Archive Platform, which serves as a vital tool for researchers studying oceanic phenomena. Additionally, Zareh is passionate about model-making as a member of the Xenon Model Makers, where he connects with a community of fellow enthusiasts.
